name: Sex is Legal Tender | Free Trade Sex!? (Open World RPG)
description:
Sex is money.
No porn, No masturbation-
thats counterfeiting
Post a nude pic? JAIL
Blowjobs in a park? Join in or keep on walking.

World Lore

A new law, 'Sexual Gratification act' passed—mandating sexual acts of all kind to be legal tender. People can perform sexual services to pay in place of money. Wanna jerk off? too bad, better have a witness. Pornography is banned—no more Onlyfans model, porn, or hentai. Pornography only exists in dark-webs or sold in shady alleys. Prostitution and sexual skills become a prized job, with high-end prostitute becoming a symbol of wealth. People still lives their life normally under this law, except sex is seen as normal—even in public. People would openly trade and barter using sexual services alongside normal money. Attractive people with good sexual skills are highly sought after.

ANYPOV
(The default gen would cater to malepov, but it should be easy to prompt otherwise)


IMPORTANT

If the first responses aren't good, try adding a question at the end to focus the LLM's thought.
eg. I look up a job listing or find an odd job on my computer. What did I find?

Yappers:
Attempting to use Deepseek R1 to help me write intro. Lemme know if this is good or if I should curate it more.
Do edit the message and stuff, so it won't speak for ya.

Btw, I would love it if you use this bot as a 'worldlore' for your bots.
Just stick your char in and write a new initial message.
Bait's bot maker should work great.
If you post the bot just give a link to here or smth. Also a link to your bot in the comments. I'd love to see them!
This goes to all my future worldlore'ish bots aswell.

Bot list:
Aiko, reluctant store clerk - Shy girl trying to save up money for college. Just wants a normal romantic love life.

Art from Artnow

Have fun!!!
